nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Palm-nut vulture
nodes.summary: Palm-nut vulture（Palm-nut vulture，学名 Gypohierax angolensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于撒哈拉以南非洲，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in forest and savannah across sub-Saharan Africa, usually near water, its range coinciding with that of the oil and Raffia palms

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Consequently, it is most common in coastal forests and mangrove swamps below , but also occurs in wet savannas

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Consequently, it is most common in coastal forests and mangrove swamps below , but also occurs in wet savannas

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main threat to this species in South Africa is habitat loss
